name: 5emcp
description: Complete D&D 5e reference — spells, monsters, items, classes, backgrounds, feats, races, sourcebooks, adventures, and homebrew. Backed by live 5etools data. No API key required.
long_description: Provides every content type from 5e.tools: spells with full descriptions, monster stat blocks with lore, magic items, class progressions, subclasses, backgrounds, feats, races, conditions, vehicles, traps, deities, languages, variant rules, random tables, and full sourcebook/adventure prose text. All content is fetched live from the 5etools GitHub repositories — nothing is stored. Also searches TheGiddyLimit/homebrew community content via the include_homebrew flag.

github_token.title: GitHub Token
github_token.description: Read-only GitHub personal access token (public repos scope). Strongly recommended — unauthenticated requests are rate-limited to 60/hr. Create one at https://github.com/settings/tokens

ruleset.title: Default Ruleset
ruleset.description: Which D&D 5e ruleset to use by default. Enter '2024' for current rules (Player's Handbook 2024) or '2014' for legacy rules.
